meta.name: lince-gemini-paranoid
meta.description: Gemini paranoid: only generativelanguage.googleapis.com via nono credential proxy; ~/.gemini isolated to a per-agent scratch HOME (rsync'd at spawn, deleted on stop). API-key auth only — OAuth users should use normal/permissive (paranoid does NOT allow accounts.google.com / oauth2.googleapis.com to keep the surface minimal).
